title: Welcome to my Blog
content:
This is the first post on my new blog. I'll be sharing my thoughts on technology, design, and life.

## Why I started this blog
I wanted a place to document my journey as a developer and designer. 

### What to expect
- Tutorials
- Case studies
- Personal reflections
excerpt: Welcome to my new blog where I share my journey as a developer.

title: The Beauty of Minimalist Design
content:
Minimalism is not just about less; it's about the right amount of everything.

> "Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works." - Steve Jobs

In this post, we explore how minimalist design can improve user experience by reducing cognitive load.
excerpt: Exploring the principles of minimalist design and its impact on UX.
